How's it going team? In this video I wanted to talk to you a bit about Front App, what you can do with it, and how we use it. So Front Apps are a really cool tool. It looks a lot like an email inbox. That's because they really focus on giving you different inboxes to manage your messages and do some cool things with it. Now you're able to respond to emails, SMS messages, their Twilio, Facebook messages, either through a page or a group, Twitter, in front with organized team inboxes. So you can do an inbox per channel. You're able to collaborate and see who's working on what to avoid duplicate replies and missing messages that you need to pay attention to. You can communicate with teammates leaving messages inside the original email or message instead of forwarding or replying all. You can also edit the same email templates together like Google Docs to write even better responses. You're able to automate messages being moved to different places, tagged, labeled, and assigned to either a person, team, or inbox through a whole bunch of different cool rules. Now we use it as a way to centralize messages, provide access to accounts via front instead of multiple logins and to send and receive messages. So you're able to connect a lot of different platforms to front, then you're able to send and receive and look for new messages inside a front, and instead of providing somebody logins for every single one of your platforms, making them admins, you can give them a log in to front after you've connected front to all of those channels. That way they only have to log into one place and you only have to worry about changing one password. They're only able to access those messages as opposed to all the settings and billing information for those accounts. We'll show you some cool ways to use front. We normally connect it with Zapier or Agile CRM or Facebook. That way you're able to manage those messages. I hope you enjoyed this video and hope you have a great rest of your day.
